experiences.description: Worked on ResumeeAI (AI-based resume builder) during final year project and internship with the startup. Built the product during 7th and 8th semester and received Best Project recognition from the university.

Researched 5+ resume builder platforms to understand workflows, features, and product expectations
Designed the system architecture, database schema, and table associations for the platform
Developed RESTful APIs for core application functionality
Implemented OAuth 2.0 authentication with Google and LinkedIn without third-party libraries
Built JWT-based authorization and backend middleware for API security
Integrated Gemini AI API for AI-powered resume generation and related application features
Worked across Node.js, Express.js, React.js, MSSQL, Sequelize ORM, Redux, Tailwind CSS, and HTML
Supported deployment architecture using AWS services including EC2, RDS, S3, ELB, and CloudFront

experiences.description: Working full-time on three products: ResumeeAI, TalentPulseAI, and UninestAI. Building scalable backend systems, AI integrations, and production-grade REST APIs using Node.js, Express.js, MSSQL, Sequelize ORM, Stored Procedures, and T-SQL.

projects.name: ResumeeAI
projects.description: Continued development of ResumeeAI as a full-time engineer after internship. Fine-tuned a local Mistral-7B model on 45,000+ resumes using structured resume template JSON data, significantly reducing latency and eliminating dependency on external AI services.
projects.outcome: Reduced AI response time from 30s to 20s. Reduced Gemini API cost by 100% and removed dependency on external AI services.

custom.architecture: Normalized relational design with fine-tuned local LLM

projects.name: TalentPulseAI
projects.description: AI-based online skill assessment platform for recruiters and companies. Designed a scalable database with 50+ normalized tables and developed 60+ REST APIs. Implemented a Gemini-powered question generation module that automated 80% of manual content creation.
projects.outcome: Improved complex query performance by 30%. Automated 80% of manual content creation. Reduced question preparation time from hours to minutes.

custom.architecture: Scalable normalized DB with 50+ tables, hybrid ORM + raw SQL

projects.name: UninestAI
projects.description: Student placement and university management portal connecting students, universities, and companies. Translated business requirements into technical workflows, designed normalized MSSQL schema, and built a transaction-safe Stored Procedure framework with 100+ SP-driven APIs.
projects.outcome: Delivered a modular REST API architecture with structured error handling, inter-procedure communication, and Swagger documentation improving frontend integration and cross-team efficiency.

custom.architecture: Modular SP-driven REST API with optimized relational schema
